item.title: Scania NG SCS, PGRS Light Pack v1.59 ETS2
item.description:
Euro Truck Simulator 2 Mods | American Truck Simulator Mods | May 14, 2026

Scania NG SCS, PGRS Light Pack v1.59 ETS2

Includes:
– tinted glass snake eyes headlights with white/blue/orange/red strob ligths
– clear glass snake eyes headlights with white/blue/orange/red strob ligths
– tinted glass normal headlights with white/blue/orange/red strob ligths
– clear glass normal headlights with white/blue/orange/red strob ligths
– clear glass fog lights with scania budge turn signals
– tinted glass fog lights with scania budge turn signals
– tinted glass mid lights
– clear glass mid lights
– tinted glass top lights
– clear glass top lights
– clear/tinted glass lights witout strob lights
– clear/tinted glass lights snake eyes witout strob lights

Tested for 1.59 game version

Credits: KJDesign

How to install ETS2 mods or ATS Mods
In Euro Truck Simulator 2 it’s easy to install mods. You just need to download mod from here, copy/unzip files into: “My Documents\Euro Truck Simulator 2\mod” folder or if you play ATS please install mods to: “My Documents\American Truck Simulator\mod” folder. To unzip files you can use: WinRAR or 7zip. After that you need to activate the mods you want to use.
Report bugs in the comments and help modders improve this mod. Always check the comments, you can find a solution.

DOWNLOAD MOD
item.content:encoded:
Euro Truck Simulator 2 Mods | American Truck Simulator Mods | May 14, 2026

Scania NG SCS, PGRS Light Pack v1.59 ETS2

Includes:
– tinted glass snake eyes headlights with white/blue/orange/red strob ligths
– clear glass snake eyes headlights with white/blue/orange/red strob ligths
– tinted glass normal headlights with white/blue/orange/red strob ligths
– clear glass normal headlights with white/blue/orange/red strob ligths
– clear glass fog lights with scania budge turn signals
– tinted glass fog lights with scania budge turn signals
– tinted glass mid lights
– clear glass mid lights
– tinted glass top lights
– clear glass top lights
– clear/tinted glass lights witout strob lights
– clear/tinted glass lights snake eyes witout strob lights

Tested for 1.59 game version

Credits: KJDesign

How to install ETS2 mods or ATS Mods
In Euro Truck Simulator 2 it’s easy to install mods. You just need to download mod from here, copy/unzip files into: “My Documents\Euro Truck Simulator 2\mod” folder or if you play ATS please install mods to: “My Documents\American Truck Simulator\mod” folder. To unzip files you can use: WinRAR or 7zip. After that you need to activate the mods you want to use.
Report bugs in the comments and help modders improve this mod. Always check the comments, you can find a solution.

DOWNLOAD MOD

item.title: Lights Pack for Scania RJL v1.59 ETS2
item.description:
Euro Truck Simulator 2 Mods | American Truck Simulator Mods | May 14, 2026

Lights Pack for Scania RJL v1.59 ETS2

Features:
Works on all Scania RJL R, R4, G, T, T4
Custom Lightmasks
All Paint Parts are Skinnable
8 Light types
4 bumperlight variants
Headlight: Clear Glass/Tinted with many variants

Tested for 1.59 game version

Credits: Mourtos

How to install ETS2 mods or ATS Mods
In Euro Truck Simulator 2 it’s easy to install mods. You just need to download mod from here, copy/unzip files into: “My Documents\Euro Truck Simulator 2\mod” folder or if you play ATS please install mods to: “My Documents\American Truck Simulator\mod” folder. To unzip files you can use: WinRAR or 7zip. After that you need to activate the mods you want to use.
Report bugs in the comments and help modders improve this mod. Always check the comments, you can find a solution.

DOWNLOAD MOD
item.content:encoded:
Euro Truck Simulator 2 Mods | American Truck Simulator Mods | May 14, 2026

Lights Pack for Scania RJL v1.59 ETS2

Features:

Tested for 1.59 game version

How to install ETS2 mods or ATS Mods
In Euro Truck Simulator 2 it’s easy to install mods. You just need to download mod from here, copy/unzip files into: “My Documents\Euro Truck Simulator 2\mod” folder or if you play ATS please install mods to: “My Documents\American Truck Simulator\mod” folder. To unzip files you can use: WinRAR or 7zip. After that you need to activate the mods you want to use.
Report bugs in the comments and help modders improve this mod. Always check the comments, you can find a solution.

DOWNLOAD MOD

item.title: SCS Wheels Rework v1.59 ETS2
item.description:
Euro Truck Simulator 2 Mods | American Truck Simulator Mods | May 14, 2026

SCS Wheels Rework v1.59 ETS2

This mod is a rework of the standard SCS wheels.
A total of 125 models have been updated.
The most popular (and realistic) wheels, nuts, hubs and hub covers for both trucks and trailers, improved and standardized their material parameters to make them look better.

Wheels options: 5 front, 2 rear, 5 trailer with GLOSS, CHROME, PAINT and CUSTOM PAINT* variants.
Nuts options: 1 front, 1 rear, 3 trailer with GLOSS, CHROME and PAINT variants.
Hubs options: 8 front, 5 rear, 9 trailer with MATTE and PAINT variants.
Hub covers options: 2 front, 1 rear, 3 trailer with GLOSS, CHROME and PAINT variants.

The CUSTOM PAINT wheels allows you to select 1 color in game, while the other color is white by default. You can change the color of the white part, editing “vehicle/truck/upgrade/wheel/disc/editabl_texture.dds”.

Updated for 1.59 game version

Credits: Albertoequisyezeta

How to install ETS2 mods or ATS Mods
In Euro Truck Simulator 2 it’s easy to install mods. You just need to download mod from here, copy/unzip files into: “My Documents\Euro Truck Simulator 2\mod” folder or if you play ATS please install mods to: “My Documents\American Truck Simulator\mod” folder. To unzip files you can use: WinRAR or 7zip. After that you need to activate the mods you want to use.
Report bugs in the comments and help modders improve this mod. Always check the comments, you can find a solution.

DOWNLOAD MOD
item.content:encoded:
Euro Truck Simulator 2 Mods | American Truck Simulator Mods | May 14, 2026

SCS Wheels Rework v1.59 ETS2

This mod is a rework of the standard SCS wheels.
A total of 125 models have been updated.
The most popular (and realistic) wheels, nuts, hubs and hub covers for both trucks and trailers, improved and standardized their material parameters to make them look better.

Wheels options: 5 front, 2 rear, 5 trailer with GLOSS, CHROME, PAINT and CUSTOM PAINT* variants.
Nuts options: 1 front, 1 rear, 3 trailer with GLOSS, CHROME and PAINT variants.
Hubs options: 8 front, 5 rear, 9 trailer with MATTE and PAINT variants.
Hub covers options: 2 front, 1 rear, 3 trailer with GLOSS, CHROME and PAINT variants.

The CUSTOM PAINT wheels allows you to select 1 color in game, while the other color is white by default. You can change the color of the white part, editing “vehicle/truck/upgrade/wheel/disc/editabl_texture.dds”.

Updated for 1.59 game version

Credits: Albertoequisyezeta

How to install ETS2 mods or ATS Mods
In Euro Truck Simulator 2 it’s easy to install mods. You just need to download mod from here, copy/unzip files into: “My Documents\Euro Truck Simulator 2\mod” folder or if you play ATS please install mods to: “My Documents\American Truck Simulator\mod” folder. To unzip files you can use: WinRAR or 7zip. After that you need to activate the mods you want to use.
Report bugs in the comments and help modders improve this mod. Always check the comments, you can find a solution.

DOWNLOAD MOD

item.title: ALL TRUCKS AT THE DEALER 13 05 2026 v1.0 1.50 1.59 ATS
item.description:
Euro Truck Simulator 2 Mods | American Truck Simulator Mods | May 14, 2026

ALL TRUCKS AT THE DEALER 13 05 2026 v1.0 1.50 1.59 ATS

THIS MOD DOESN’T NEED TO EXTRACT PUT IT AS YOU DOWNLOADED IT IN YOUR GAME’S MODS FOLDER
OPTION TO PURCHASE ALL OLD TRUCKS TOGETHER WITH THE NEW SCS
OPTION TO PURCHASE ELECTRIC TRUCKS

Credits: RODONITCHO MODS

How to install ETS2 mods or ATS Mods
In Euro Truck Simulator 2 it’s easy to install mods. You just need to download mod from here, copy/unzip files into: “My Documents\Euro Truck Simulator 2\mod” folder or if you play ATS please install mods to: “My Documents\American Truck Simulator\mod” folder. To unzip files you can use: WinRAR or 7zip. After that you need to activate the mods you want to use.
Report bugs in the comments and help modders improve this mod. Always check the comments, you can find a solution.

DOWNLOAD MOD

item.title: 550 GALLON FOR ALL TRUCKS 13 05 2026 v1.0 1.50 1.59 ATS
item.description:
Euro Truck Simulator 2 Mods | American Truck Simulator Mods | May 14, 2026

550 GALLON FOR ALL TRUCKS 13 05 2026 v1.0 1.50 1.59 ATS

THIS MOD DOESN’T NEED TO EXTRACT PUT IT AS YOU DOWNLOADED IT IN YOUR GAME’S MODS FOLDER

RECOMMENDED MOD ALL TRUCKS AT THE DEALER ATS BY RODONITCHO MODS 1.0 1.50 1.59 13 05 2026
ADDS 550 US GALLONS (2082 LITERS OF DIESEL)
ALL SCS TRUCKS

Credits: RODONITCHO MODS

How to install ETS2 mods or ATS Mods
In Euro Truck Simulator 2 it’s easy to install mods. You just need to download mod from here, copy/unzip files into: “My Documents\Euro Truck Simulator 2\mod” folder or if you play ATS please install mods to: “My Documents\American Truck Simulator\mod” folder.
